---
title: "Planktivore Labelling Guide"
listing:
  id: class-grid
  contents: "classes/*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  image-height: "180px"
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, categories]
  sort: "title asc"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: false
---

A visual reference for annotating images from the **Planktivore** passive plankton
imager. Each class page shows *ideal* reference images alongside *challenging*
real-world examples, a description of the class-defining characteristics, and notes
on how to tell it apart from similar classes.

Use the category filters and search box below to find a class. New annotators should
start with [About this guide](about.qmd).

::: {#class-grid}
:::
